1024.speedup_note: CRT is 2.76× faster. Note: 2.76× at 1024-bit reflects Python big-integer overhead at smaller moduli. Asymptotic speedup converges toward 4× at 2048-bit+.

2048.speedup_note: CRT is 3.30× faster. Note: 2.76× at 1024-bit reflects Python big-integer overhead at smaller moduli. Asymptotic speedup converges toward 4× at 2048-bit+.
